title: podman pull fails to pull a gcr image
body:
podman pull fails to pull the image `gcr.io/google-samples/node-hello:1.0`. However docker pull is able to pull this image.

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:
/kind bug

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. podman pull gcr.io/google-samples/node-hello:1.0

**Describe the results you received:**
```
Trying to pull gcr.io/google-samples/node-hello:1.0...Getting image source signatures
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:fdd5d7827f33ef075f45262a0f74ac96ec8a5e687faeb40135319764963dcb42
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:a3ed95caeb02ffe68cdd9fd84406680ae93d633cb16422d00e8a7c22955b46d4
Copying blob sha256:0f35d0fe50cc8378069ab18a20a7aa65bda82e19b5caca53d21e3866d203aa07
 17.68 MB / 17.68 MB [======================================================] 1s
Copying blob sha256:7b40647e93b7de2fbeb95076bb5a56f6024c3c4217b8e810d36b8f10c535e239
 40.53 MB / 40.53 MB [======================================================] 3s
Copying blob sha256:ce5207842c4c68105560901894842e206e6009db281fe41654d36b5ed1d6ced9
 122.64 MB / 122.64 MB [====================================================] 8s
Copying blob sha256:5a3b05f77d24f950fb90d116685f3c95a113afde8e5f6b66a2555f809fb83a8f
 28.44 KB / 28.44 KB [======================================================] 0s
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:a3ed95caeb02ffe68cdd9fd84406680ae93d633cb16422d00e8a7c22955b46d4
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:a3ed95caeb02ffe68cdd9fd84406680ae93d633cb16422d00e8a7c22955b46d4
Copying blob sha256:cef926eb5ed493d2da2eab263237adfe991eccf56050f30a833ad9c6e3ba4aef
 11.55 MB / 11.55 MB [======================================================] 0s
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:a3ed95caeb02ffe68cdd9fd84406680ae93d633cb16422d00e8a7c22955b46d4
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:a3ed95caeb02ffe68cdd9fd84406680ae93d633cb16422d00e8a7c22955b46d4
Copying blob sha256:63a80fa3b6ad7d45d27e6c926d245e14a6138dcca2ed187fde91ea8702c51844
 627 B / 627 B [============================================================] 0s
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:a3ed95caeb02ffe68cdd9fd84406680ae93d633cb16422d00e8a7c22955b46d4
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
ERRO[0020] error unmounting /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef/merged: no such file or directory 
Failed
error pulling image "gcr.io/google-samples/node-hello:1.0": unable to pull gcr.io/google-samples/node-hello:1.0
```


**Describe the results you expected:**
Successfully pulls image

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:       0.4.3-dev
Go Version:    go1.10.1
Git Commit:    "fa8442e4a063b9a074cd2d17effdf5de138f90cb"
Built:         Mon Apr 16 10:41:44 2018
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

comments.body: @umohnani8 do you have gcr anything in your registries.conf?
@baude nope, but I gave the full path to `podman pull`.

@umohnani8 I cannot replicate this.  Tried with 96d11622c60e80e706c7bc18a096dc0a762f3e9f:

@baude I saw this as well yesterday, but it seems fixed today. Maybe intermittent trouble with the gcr.io registry?
@umohnani8 if this works today for you close, the issue.
@baude I am still seeing this issue - I am up to date with upstream master. But it works with docker pull for me.
@baude I can replicate locally, but only if I remove the 1.0 tag and try and pull without a tag
@mheon it is failing for me with the tag :( It looks like it fails at the clean up stage for me.
yes, that isnt a pull issue imho.
try pulling to a new storage space?

Pulling to a new storage space worked! My default one was messed up, nuked it and it is working fine with that as well. Closing issue.
Thanks @baude
